positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a majestic forest animal (like a fox, deer, or owl) seamlessly integrated with lush, stylized floral patterns and tropical foliage. The composition should feature the animal in a graceful, stylized silhouette against a background of vibrant, interlocking leaves and blooming flowers. Style should be inspired by sophisticated botanical etchings and Art Nouveau, using a limited, contrasting color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, warm copper, and creamy white. The layout must be perfectly centered, highly scalable, and designed to repeat cleanly across fabric, with distinct negative space between elements to ensure print clarity. High contrast, deep rich colors, vector illustration aesthetic, complex linework, decorative pattern, maximalist yet clean.
negative: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logos, cartoon, photorealistic, grayscale, monochrome, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, noisy
